use_cases: Creating scroll-linked SVG path animations that draw as users scroll through a page
Building engaging landing page sections with scroll-triggered visual effects
Adding parallax-like animations to hero sections or storytelling pages
Designing portfolio or creative agency sites with unique scroll interactions
Implementing scroll progress indicators with custom SVG artwork
ai_summary: A scroll-driven SVG animation component that uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks to animate an SVG stroke path following the user's scroll progress. The component features a tall scrollable section with text content and a decorative SVG line that morphs and reveals based on scroll position, creating an engaging visual storytelling effect perfect for landing pages and portfolio sites.
